tests.name: Create player returns integer id
tests.why: Creating a valid player from clean state should return 201 and an integer player_id.

tests.name: Join non-existent player is not_found
tests.why: Join should reject an invalid player_id even when game setup exists.

tests.name: Duplicate join in joined game is rejected
tests.why: A player already in the game should not create a second join record.

tests.name: Place rejects overlapping ship coordinates
tests.why: Ship placement should fail when two submitted coordinates overlap.

tests.name: Out-of-turn fire is forbidden
tests.why: In playing state, player 2 firing first should be rejected with forbidden.

tests.name: Moves endpoint returns list for playing game
tests.why: Move history endpoint should return 200 for a valid playing game state.
